title: What can I do for you? — фразы

items.example: Could you possibly help me carry these bags?
Would you mind opening the window? It's hot in here.
I'd be happy to help you with the project.

items.phrase: Is there anything I can do?
items.example: Is there anything I can do to help you prepare?

items.phrase: Let me know if you need anything
items.translation: Дай мне знать, если тебе что-то нужно
items.example: Let me know if you need anything for the party.

items.phrase: Can I give you a hand?
items.example: Can I give you a hand with the decorations?
